candidate.name: physicalized_independent_412_candidate
candidate.note: Physicalization of the independent strict 4->8->12 candidate: target detuning -0.08, Stage A offset +0.040, generated damping factor 1.05, A->B coupling 0.90, limiter 0.03. Discovery drive is source-only; no direct 8 drive, no direct 12 drive, no target-frequency injection.

direct_reference.name: direct_source_plus_generated_reference_ceiling
direct_reference.note: Ceiling denominator only. This row uses direct 8 drive and is not a discovery candidate.
